caption: A young woman with beaded braids and dark sunglasses poses in front of a plain grey wall under direct flash lighting, wearing a black and white leather jacket with "U.B. TUFF" printed on the front. The scene transforms into a young woman with beaded braids and dark sunglasses wears a purple and pink jacket with black outlines and the text "U.B. TUFF" against a bright, geometric pink and purple background.

A young man with a mustache, wearing a white bandana, a white t-shirt, grey shorts, and red and black sneakers, sits on a black equipment case next to a brick wall under bright flash lighting. The scene transforms into a young man wearing a patterned bandana, a t-shirt, and necklaces looks forward under vibrant orange and red lighting, with a metal equipment stand to his left against a dark background.

A Black man wearing a tan double-breasted suit, a white shirt, and a dark patterned tie stands outdoors with his hands clasped behind a bright red car hood, surrounded by palm trees and lush greenery under bright daylight. The scene transforms into a man with a beard wearing a light green double-breasted suit and a patterned tie stands with his hands clasped in front of a background of blue palm trees.

A blonde woman wearing a blue and white checkered beanie, a blue athletic jersey, and gold jewelry touches her lip while posing outdoors at night under warm lighting with blurry streetlights in the background. The scene transforms into a young woman with long blonde hair, wearing a yellow and orange checkered beanie and a purple graphic jersey, stands with her finger to her lip against a bright pink background with blurred outdoor lights.

A Black male model poses in a desert landscape filled with cacti under a warm sunset sky, wearing a black western-style jacket with white fringe, a bright yellow shirt, black wide-leg trousers, and a turquoise necklace. The scene transforms into a man depicted in bright yellow line art wears a fringed western suit and a black shirt in a desert landscape filled with cacti under a warm sky.

A young woman with beaded braids and black sunglasses stands in front of a textured grey wall, wearing a black and white leather jacket with "U.B. TUFF" printed on it under bright flash lighting. The scene transforms into a young woman with braided hair and white beads wears black sunglasses and a purple and pink jacket with the text "U.B. TUFF" against a geometric pink and purple background.

A young woman with slicked-back dark hair and a neutral expression looks directly at the camera, wearing a blue athletic t-shirt with white lettering and two gold cross necklaces in a warmly lit indoor setting. The scene transforms into a woman with slicked-back hair and two cross necklaces wears an oversized red t-shirt with the text "MPENS?" while standing in a doorway under warm, monochromatic yellow-orange lighting.

A young woman with slicked-back dark hair and layered gold cross necklaces wears a blue athletic t-shirt with white lettering that reads "MPENS?" against a warm-toned indoor background. The scene transforms into a young woman with slicked-back dark hair, wearing a yellow t-shirt with white lettering and two gold cross necklaces, stands against a blue and white graphic background.
